definition:
ὁμολογία, -ας, ἡ
 (όμολογέω), [in LXX: Deu.12:6, 17. Amo.4:5, Eze.46:12 (נְדָבָה), Lev.22:18, Jer.44:25 (נֶדֶר), I Est.9:8 * ;] 
  1. in cl., an agreement assent, compact (in π., of a contract; Deiss., BS, 249). 
   2. confession (prob. always in an objective sense): 2Co.9:13, 1Ti.6:12-13 Heb.3:1 4:14 10:13.†
 (AS)
